Title: User successfully logs in
Preconditions: User has registered and provided valid credentials
Test Steps:
1. User initiates the process by clicking "Start".
2. User navigates to the "Login" page.
3. User enters valid username and password.
4. User clicks "Login".
Expected Result: User is redirected to the homepage and sees a success message.

Title: User fails to log in with invalid credentials
Preconditions: User has registered but provides incorrect credentials
Test Steps:
1. User initiates the process by clicking "Start".
2. User navigates to the "Login" page.
3. User enters invalid username and password.
4. User clicks "Login".
Expected Result: User remains on the login page with an error message indicating failed login attempt.

Title: User successfully registers
Preconditions: User does not have an existing account
Test Steps:
1. User initiates the process by clicking "Start".
2. User navigates to the "Register" page.
3. User fills in the registration form with valid details.
4. User clicks "Register".
Expected Result: User is redirected to the homepage and sees a success message.

Title: User fails to register with invalid data
Preconditions: User attempts to register with incomplete or invalid data
Test Steps:
1. User initiates the process by clicking "Start".
2. User navigates to the "Register" page.
3. User leaves required fields empty.
4. User clicks "Register".
Expected Result: User remains on the registration page with validation errors displayed.

Title: User successfully requests password reset
Preconditions: User has registered and provided a valid email address
Test Steps:
1. User clicks "Forgot Password".
2. User enters valid email address.
3. User clicks "Submit".
Expected Result: User receives an email with a link to reset password.

Title: User fails to request password reset with invalid email
Preconditions: User has registered but provides an invalid email address
Test Steps:
1. User clicks "Forgot Password".
2. User enters invalid email address.
3. User clicks "Submit".
Expected Result: User sees an error message indicating that the email is invalid.

Title: User successfully resets password
Preconditions: User has received a password reset link via email
Test Steps:
1. User clicks the password reset link.
2. User enters a new password.
3. User clicks "Reset Password".
Expected Result: User is redirected to the login page with a success message.

Title: User fails to reset password with weak password
Preconditions: User has received a password reset link via email
Test Steps:
1. User clicks the password reset link.
2. User enters a weak password.
3. User clicks "Reset Password".
Expected Result: User sees an error message indicating that the password is too weak.

Title: User successfully logs out
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps: 1. User clicks "Logout".
Expected Result: User is redirected to the login page.

Title: User successfully places an order
Preconditions: User is logged in and has added items to the cart
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the product page.
2. User adds the product to the cart.
3. User proceeds to checkout.
4. User confirms the order.
Expected Result: User sees a confirmation message indicating successful order placement.

Title: User fails to place an order due to insufficient stock
Preconditions: User is logged in and tries to order a product with zero stock
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the product page.
2. User attempts to add the product to the cart.
3. User proceeds to checkout.
4. User confirms the order.
Expected Result: User sees an error message indicating that the product is out of stock.

Title: User successfully logs in as an admin
Preconditions: User has admin privileges and provides valid credentials
Test Steps:
1. User clicks "Login".
2. User enters valid admin credentials.
3. User clicks "Login".
Expected Result: User is redirected to the admin dashboard.

Title: User fails to log in as an admin with invalid credentials
Preconditions: User has admin privileges but provides incorrect credentials
Test Steps:
1. User clicks "Login".
2. User enters invalid admin credentials.
3. User clicks "Login".
Expected Result: User remains on the login page with an error message indicating failed login attempt.

Title: Admin successfully logs out
Preconditions: Admin is logged in
Test Steps: 1. Admin clicks "Logout".
Expected Result: Admin is redirected to the login page.

Title: User successfully navigates to the homepage
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps: 1. User clicks "Homepage".
Expected Result: User is redirected to the homepage.

Title: User fails to navigate to the homepage without being logged in
Preconditions: User is not logged in
Test Steps: 1. User clicks "Homepage".
Expected Result: User is redirected to the login page with a message indicating they need to log in first.

Title: User successfully manages their account
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. User clicks "Account Settings".
2. User updates personal information.
3. User saves changes.
Expected Result: User sees a confirmation message indicating successful account update.

Title: User fails to manage their account with invalid input
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. User clicks "Account Settings".
2. User enters invalid email address.
3. User saves changes.
Expected Result: User sees an error message indicating that the email is invalid.

Title: User successfully views their order history
Preconditions: User has placed orders
Test Steps:
1. User clicks "Order History".
2. User views past orders.
Expected Result: User sees a list of their previous orders.

Title: User fails to view order history without placing any orders
Preconditions: User has not placed any orders
Test Steps:
1. User clicks "Order History".
2. User views past orders.
Expected Result: User sees a message indicating that there are no orders to display.

Title: User successfully views product details
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the product page.
2. User views product details.
Expected Result: User sees detailed information about the product.

Title: User fails to view product details for a non-existent product
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the product page.
2. User attempts to view product details.
Expected Result: User sees an error message indicating that the product does not exist.

Title: User successfully adds a product to the cart
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the product page.
2. User adds the product to the cart.
Expected Result: User sees a confirmation message indicating the product was added to the cart.

Title: User fails to add a product to the cart due to insufficient stock
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the product page.
2. User attempts to add the product to the cart.
Expected Result: User sees an error message indicating that the product is out of stock.

Title: User successfully completes the checkout process
Preconditions: User has items in the cart
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the cart.
2. User proceeds to checkout.
3. User confirms the order.
Expected Result: User sees a confirmation message indicating successful order placement.

Title: User fails to complete the checkout process due to incomplete form
Preconditions: User has items in the cart
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the cart.
2. User proceeds to checkout.
3. User leaves required fields empty.
4. User confirms the order.
Expected Result: User sees an error message indicating that the form is incomplete.

Title: Admin successfully accesses the admin dashboard
Preconditions: Admin is logged in
Test Steps: 1. Admin clicks "Admin Dashboard".
Expected Result: Admin sees the admin dashboard with various management options.

Title: Admin fails to access the admin dashboard without logging in
Preconditions: Admin is not logged in
Test Steps: 1. Admin clicks "Admin Dashboard".
Expected Result: Admin is redirected to the login page with a message indicating they need to log in first.

Title: Admin successfully manages user accounts
Preconditions: Admin is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Admin clicks "Manage Users".
2. Admin searches for a user.
3. Admin updates user information.
4. Admin saves changes.
Expected Result: Admin sees a confirmation message indicating successful account update.
